mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in greater than 55% of rate-cut periods over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in greater than 60% of triggered instances despite the unemployment spike.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a Rank IC below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or returns are negative when both series expand concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects improving supply-side capacity utilization and corporate output growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in greater than 50% of periods where INDPRO growth exceeds 0.5% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price inflation above 3.5% annually forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, increasing discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 20d returns in greater than 65% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds the 3.5% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, boosting corporate earnings expectations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to produce a statistically significant positive alpha with a t-statistic below 1.96 over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding real gross domestic product reflects underlying economic growth that supports corporate revenue expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP growth correlates negatively with 60-day forward returns over a 10-year sample, or Rank IC remains below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month contraction in industrial production exceeding 0.3% signals immediate supply-side weakness and inventory drawdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 55% of instances where industrial production contracts by more than 0.3%.
